metadata.title: AGIL | Auditoria & Gestion Inteligente de Lineamientos
metadata.description: Specialized firm in government auditing, internal control, and traceability technology solutions for all three levels of government in Mexico.

hero.subtitle: We combine expertise in government auditing with technology solutions for operational control. From manual processes to auditable and scalable systems.

pillar2.label: Coverage
pillar2.text: All three levels of government in Mexico

card1.label: Total traceability
card1.title: An auditable record of who, where, and when

card2.label: Regulatory framework
card2.title: ASF · SFP · CONAC · 3 levels of government

card3.label: Modularity
card3.title: Start with software, scale to hardware

card4.label: Diagnosis
card4.title: A technical diagnosis session at no cost

services.title: Expertise for public management
services.description: Designed for Mexico's regulatory framework. We cover all three levels of government with technical rigor and real support at every stage.

card01.title: Government Auditing
card01.description: Financial, performance, compliance, and public works auditing. Review from bidding to handover-reception with strict alignment to CONAC.

card02.title: Comprehensive Risk Management
card02.description: Risk matrices, anti-fraud protocols, cybersecurity, and business continuity plans aligned with the SNA.

card03.title: Internal Control & Compliance
card03.description: Implementation of the COSO model under SFP requirements. Organization manuals, codes of ethics, and reporting/complaint systems.

card04.title: Advisory & Settlement Support
card04.description: Guidance against ASF, ASE, and SFP. Technical files, response letters, and accounting harmonization aligned to CONAC.

technology.title: Technology for institutions without blind spots
technology.description: The problem isn't lack of information — it's that information isn't available in real time.

card01.title: Access Control & Visitor Management
card01.description: Frictionless perimeter security via QR. Real-time auditable entry/exit records, digital credentials, and automated reports.
card01.scenario: A citizen receives a QR when scheduling an appointment. Upon arrival they scan it — the system notifies the officer and records the exact time. No paper logbooks.

card02.title: Human Capital Management
card02.description: Check-in/out with geolocation. Verifies presence in the correct coordinates and generates consolidated hour reports without discrepancies.
card02.scenario: The field supervisor confirms that staff started at the right place and time. At month-end, HR downloads the report without manual reconciliation.

card03.title: Asset & Inventory Control
card03.description: Digital monitoring of stock and fixed assets. Low-stock alerts and decision dashboards. Scalable to RFID technology.
card03.scenario: The system alerts when critical supplies fall below the threshold. Missing items are detected in minutes, without stopping operations.

technology.modularNote: All our solutions are modular: start with software and scale to RFID, sensors, or vehicle barriers as your institution requires.

leftCard.title: How we work with you
leftCard.description: We don't sell generic solutions. We adapt the tools to your institution's specific workflows from day one.

card01.title: Needs diagnosis
card01.description: We analyze current processes, identify gaps, and define the implementation scope without compromises.

card02.title: Platform configuration
card02.description: We adapt system modules and workflows to your organization's specific needs.

card03.title: User training
card03.description: We train your team so they adopt the tools with confidence from day one.

card04.title: Support & scaling
card04.description: We support solution growth and integrate advanced hardware when you're ready.

team.title: Leadership with real institutional experience

item04.label: Institutional trajectory
item04.value: Superior Audit Office of the Federation (ASF) - Deputy Director of Forensic Auditing

item05.label: Reference framework
item05.value: COSO 2013 · Public Finance · Chamber of Deputies

team.quote: "Modern auditing demands speed and precision. At AGIL, those two pillars define every process."

bio.paragraph1: With more than 13 years of experience in oversight and public administration, Mtro. Nazul Peraza leads AGIL with a vision that combines technical rigor and technology adoption. His time at ASF as Deputy Director of Forensic Auditing gave him advanced analytical capability in federalized spending, forensic analysis, financial audits, performance audits, public works, and procurement, always with a risk analysis approach.
bio.paragraph2: A specialist in econometrics and data analysis, his methodology breaks away from traditional schemes and integrates advanced technology tools to automate irregularity detection, reaching efficiency levels up to 2,700% higher than conventional methods.

item01.description: years in oversight and public administration

item02.description: years as a trainer in the public sector

item03.description: higher efficiency vs conventional analytical methods

tech.name:
Alisson
Rodrigues

item01.title: Communications Sergeant
item01.description: Brazilian Army. Team leadership and technical communications management.

item02.title: Research & Analysis
item02.description: Scientific research in innovation and work at the Federal University of Rio Grande do Sul (UFRGS).

item03.title: Full-stack solution development
item03.description: Full-stack development focused on business outcomes.

tech.quote: "It is imperative to measure in order to manage; only through precise metrics can we automate and, ultimately, create value."
tech.paragraph1: With an international trajectory rooted in intellectual autonomy, Alisson Rodrigues stands out for a global profile and strategic business vision. His experience begins as a Communications Sergeant in the Brazilian Army, complemented by studies in Social Sciences at the Federal University of Rio Grande do Sul and scientific research in innovation and startups. A specialist in ecosystems such as React, Next.js, and IoT solutions, he applies his analytical strength to software development and building data architectures in SQL and NoSQL environments.
tech.paragraph2: Guided by continuous improvement, he has focused on process engineering and organizations' technology transition, with specialized emphasis on auditing. His methodology centers on decoding how complex systems work and turning them into optimized operations. As a facilitator in international settings, he integrates solutions that automate repetitive tasks so teams can focus on analytical and creative work and achieve stronger institutional efficiency.

contact.title: Ready to manage without blind spots?
contact.description: Tell us which stage your institution is in. A specialist will get in touch to coordinate your free diagnosis session.
